name: Crockpot Beef Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds beef stew meat, cut into 1 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the meat in the crockpot.
2. Mix flour, salt, and pepper together.
3. Pour the seasoned mixture over the meat.
4. Stir to coat the meat evenly with the flour mixture.
5. Add the remaining ingredients: potatoes, celery, beef broth, garlic, paprika, onions (if using), and Kitchen Bouquet (if using).
6. Stir well to mix all the ingredients together.
7. Cover the crockpot and cook on low for 10 to 12 hours or high for 4 to 6 hours.
8. Before serving, stir the stew thoroughly to combine all the flavors.
